_context_order.prompt: Describe the story in broad strokes.
What is the current scene in the story?
What are the current narrative arcs?
What are the relevant details? Start with a list of relevant characters.
Now, describe each of the relevant characters.
Now, retrieve specific lines earlier in the story that might be relevant.

current_scene:
{% for state_name, state_data in [('Start', data.start), ('Now', data.now)] %}
Scene {{state_name}} --- {{data.what}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.current_scene.{{state_name}}, {{path}}.current_scene.what
Characters -- {% set chars = state_data.who.characters.values()|list if state_data.who.characters is mapping else state_data.who.characters %}{% for c in chars %}{{c.name}} @ {{c.location}}{% if not loop.last %}, {% endif %}{% endfor %} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.current_scene.{{state_name}}.who.characters
Groups -- {% set grps = state_data.who.groups.values()|list if state_data.who.groups is mapping else state_data.who.groups %}{% for g in grps %}{{g.name}} @ {{g.location}}{% if not loop.last %}, {% endif %}{% endfor %} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.current_scene.{{state_name}}.who.groups
When -- {{state_data.when.date}} - {{state_data.when.time}} ({{state_data.when.specific_time}}) <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.current_scene.{{state_name}}.when
Where -- {{state_data.where}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.current_scene.{{state_name}}.where
{% endfor %}
scene:
Scene --- {{name}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.scene, {{path}}.scene.name
Start -- {{start.date}} {{start.time}} ({{start.specific_time}}) <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.scene.start
End -- {{end.date}} {{end.time}} ({{end.specific_time}}) <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.scene.end
Summary -- {{summary}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.scene.summary
Catalyst -- {% if catalyst %}{{catalyst}}{% else %}N/A{% endif %} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.scene.catalyst
Outcome -- {% if outcome %}{{outcome}}{% else %}N/A{% endif %} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.scene.outcome
Participants -- {% if participants %}{{ (participants.values()|list|join(', ')) if participants is mapping else (participants|join(', ')) }}{% else %}N/A{% endif %} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.scene.participants
event:
Event --- {{name}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.event, {{path}}.event.name
When -- {{start.date}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.event.start.date
Summary -- {{summary}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.event.summary
Catalyst -- {% if catalyst %}{{catalyst}}{% else %}N/A{% endif %} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.event.catalyst
Outcome -- {% if outcome %}{{outcome}}{% else %}N/A{% endif %} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.event.outcome
Participants -- {% if participants %}{{ (participants.values()|list|join(', ')) if participants is mapping else (participants|join(', ')) }}{% else %}N/A{% endif %} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.event.participants
general_info:
Synopsis --- {{synopsis}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.general_info.synopsis
Main Objective --- {{main_objective}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.general_info.main_objective
Setting -- {% if setting %}{{setting}}{% else %}N/A{% endif %} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.general_info.setting
Rules -- {% if rules %}{{ (rules.values()|list|join(', ')) if rules is mapping else (rules|join(', ')) }}{% else %}N/A{% endif %} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.general_info.rules
Themes --- {{(themes.values()|list|join(', ')) if themes is mapping else (themes|join(', '))}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.general_info.themes
Tone --- {{tone}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.general_info.tone
Writing Style --- {{writing_style}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.general_info.writing_style
arcs:
{% for arc in data %}
Arc [{{loop.index}}] --- {{arc.title}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.arcs[{{loop.index0}}]
Status --- {{arc.status}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.arcs[{{loop.index0}}].status
Chapters --- {{(arc.chapters.values()|list|join(', ')) if arc.chapters is mapping else (arc.chapters|join(', '))}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.arcs[{{loop.index0}}].chapters
Summary --- {{arc.summary}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.arcs[{{loop.index0}}].summary
Character Arcs --- {{arc.character_arcs}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.arcs[{{loop.index0}}].character_arcs
Relationship Shifts --- {{arc.relationship_shifts}} <<<<<<<<<<<< {{path}}.arcs[{{loop.index0}}].relationship_shifts

{% endfor %}
